input.instructions:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B3-usaco-2024-february-gold-bessla-motors
Title: B3. USACO 2024 February Gold / Bessla Motors

Question:
Given a large weighted graph with charging stations, identify all destinations that are reachable from at least K distinct charging stations within the specified range constraint.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

orchestration.decision_notes: The previous child node (helper_03) attempted to provide the solution but failed due to a JSON formatting error. I will now execute the implementation of the C++ solution for the 'Bessla Motors' problem to ensure the correct code is generated and verified.

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B3-usaco-2024-february-gold-bessla-motors
Title: B3. USACO 2024 February Gold / Bessla Motors

Question:
Given a large weighted graph with charging stations, identify all destinations that are reachable from at least K distinct charging stations within the specified range constraint.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

results.content: I will implement the solution for the USACO 2024 February Gold 'Bessla Motors' problem. The problem requires finding nodes that can reach at least K distinct charging stations within a distance limit. This can be solved using a multi-source Dijkstra-like approach where we maintain the top K closest charging stations for each node.
